name: Karakuri Komachi mdl 224 "Ninishi"
name_jp: カラクリ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>小</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>町</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>弐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ニ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>弐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ニ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>四</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card must attack if able. When this face-up card is selected as an attack target, change its battle position. While this card is face-up on the field, once per turn during your Main Phase, you can Normal Summon 1 "Karakuri" monster in addition to your Normal Summon or Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.)
